en.response: Form 1 at CMA office within 60 days. No fee. Mediation attendance mandatory (LLA 4/2025).

sw.response: Fomu 1 CMA siku 60. Bila ada. Kuhudhuria lazima (LLA 4/2025).

en.response: Unilateral changes breach the contract. Object in writing. File CMA Form 1 within 60 days.

sw.response: Mabadiliko ya upande mmoja ni ukiukaji. Pinga kwa maandishi. Peleka CMA Fomu 1 siku 60.

en.response: Discrimination on protected grounds prohibited (s.7). File CMA Form 1 within 60 days. Compensation 12-24 months.

sw.response: Ubaguzi kwa misingi iliyolindwa marufuku (s.7). Peleka CMA Fomu 1 siku 60. Fidia miezi 12-24.

en.response: May be unfair termination under ELRA s.36. File CMA Form 1 within 60 days. Remedies: reinstatement, re-engagement, or 6-24 months compensation.

sw.response: Inaweza kuwa kufukuzwa bila haki ELRA s.36. Jaza CMA Fomu 1 ndani ya siku 60. Suluhu: kurudishwa, re-engagement, au fidia miezi 6-24.

en.response: 9 fixed-term categories under amended s.14(1)(b): temporary, graduate trainee, seasonal, project, non-citizen, public scheme, externally-funded, retiree, tender.

sw.response: Aina 9 chini ya s.14(1)(b): muda, graduate trainee, msimu, mradi, raia kigeni, miradi ya umma, ufadhili nje, wastaafu, tenda.

en.response: Tell me more about your situation — what happened, when, and what outcome you want.

sw.response: Niambie zaidi — kilichotokea, lini, na unataka nini.

en.response: Sexual harassment is unlawful discrimination (s.7(4)). File CMA Form 1 within 60 days. Compensation 12-24 months under s.40.

sw.response: Unyanyasaji wa kingono ni ubaguzi haramu (s.7(4)). Peleka CMA Fomu 1 siku 60. Fidia miezi 12-24 chini ya s.40.

en.response: Annual: 28 days/12mo (s.29). Sick: 126 days/3yr (s.32). Maternity: 84 days + premature extra (s.33). Paternity: 3 days + 7 premature (s.34). Unpaid: up to 30 days.

sw.response: Mwaka: siku 28/miezi 12 (s.29). Ugonjwa: siku 126/miaka 3 (s.32). Uzazi: siku 84 + premature (s.33). Baba: siku 3 + 7 premature (s.34). Bila malipo: hadi siku 30.

en.response: GN 605A/2025 sets 49 sub-sector minima effective 1 Jan 2026 ranging TZS 80,000 to 765,900/month.

sw.response: GN 605A/2025 inaweka sub-sekta 49 kuanzia 1 Jan 2026, TZS 80,000 hadi 765,900/mwezi.

en.response: ELRA s.41: 7d first month; 4d daily/weekly; 28d monthly. In writing, with reasons.

sw.response: ELRA s.41: siku 7 mwezi wa kwanza; 4 siku/wiki; 28 mwezi. Kwa maandishi, na sababu.

en.response: Overtime at 1.5x basic. 2x on rest day/holiday. Max 12 hours overtime/week.

sw.response: Overtime mara 1.5. Mara 2 mapumziko/sikukuu. Juu saa 12/wiki.

en.response: Retrenchment requires s.38 process: notice, consultation, criteria, severance. Skipped steps → unfair.

sw.response: Retrenchment inahitaji utaratibu wa s.38: notisi, majadiliano, vigezo, kifuta jasho. Hatua iliyorukwa → bila haki.

en.response: Severance = 7 × min(years,10) × monthly_wage/26. Not payable for misconduct.

sw.response: Kifuta jasho = 7 × min(miaka,10) × mshahara_wa_mwezi/26. Hakistahili kwa utovu.

en.response: Minimum wage is set by sub-sector under GN 605A/2025. If paid below, file CMA within 60 days to recover difference + interest.

sw.response: Kima cha chini kimewekwa kwa sub-sekta GN 605A/2025. Iwapo chini, peleka CMA siku 60 kurudisha tofauti + riba.

en.response: ELRA s.27 requires wages on agreed pay day. Demand in writing; if unpaid, file CMA Form 1 within 60 days for arrears + interest.

sw.response: ELRA s.27 inahitaji mshahara siku iliyokubaliwa. Dai kwa maandishi; iwapo halijalipwa, peleka CMA siku 60 kurudisha + riba.

en.response: Report to employer in writing AND WCF within 12 months. Medical care + compensation under WCA 2008.

sw.response: Ripoti mwajiri kwa maandishi NA WCF siku 12 miezi. Matibabu + fidia WCA 2008.
